content: After doing that enable in your settings Remote Desktop

1. Temporarily disable real-time protection (Windows settings)
    1.    Open Start → Settings.
    2.    Go to Privacy & Security → Windows Security.
    3.    Click Virus & threat protection.
    4.    Under Virus & threat protection settings, click Manage settings.
    5.    Toggle Real-time protection to Off.

Notes:
    •    Windows will usually re-enable it automatically after a restart.
Disable windows defender
